topic: A person changing a flat tire on a car.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: Front view: A person uses a lug wrench to loosen lug nuts.
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: Close-up: The jack lifts the car; wheel is removed.
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: Top-down: The spare tire is mounted and lug nuts are tightened.
parsed_generation.narration: Loosening the lug nuts begins the sequence in two seconds. The following shots lift the car, remove the wheel, and mount the spare, tightening.
